div.p: Operation: Traverse sorted list from bucket sentinel to find target key Spec: Harris-Michael Algorithm for Lock-Free Linked Lists

div.h2: Hazard Slot 0: sentinel (0x...0000) prev = sentinel curr = NULL (not loaded)
Target: 0x...0005 Action: curr->so_key (0x05) == target (0x05) Loop: EXIT (Condition < failed)
div.p: HP Slot 0: Node A (prev) HP Slot 1: Node B (curr)

g.text: func hm_list_find(start *Node, target_so uint64, target_key string) {
